chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4523 of 2021 CP D 4781 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.18642/2021 3. For hearing of main case 14.04.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for respondent Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, advocate for respondent Mr. Zohaib Korai advocate holds brief for Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner draws attention to request / application evidenced at page 141 hereof. Learned counsel states that it may be just and proper for the same to be decided by the respondent vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action in relation hereto be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
